# `idx drop` for [filesystem](/commands/categories/filesystem.md)

<div class='command-title'>Drop the current idx runtime from memory.</div>

## Signature

```> idx drop {flags} ```


## Input/output types:

| input   | output |
| ------- | ------ |
| nothing | record |
## Notes
Use this when you want to free the in-memory index completely before reinitializing or restoring a different snapshot.
